EmailTemplate.name: NAOCAP Notify when New AfterMarket Case Created
EmailTemplate.subject: Aftermarket Part Case {!Case.CaseNumber} created
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.Name},
Thank you for submitting a Aftermarket Part Case {!Case.CaseNumber} ! We will be reviewing your case soon and will notify you as soon as we can. Please visit your case page for more details.
Thanks & Regards, Container Aftermarket Parts Team
